basic_details.job_title: Deoria UP Anganwadi Worker & Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 408 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer, Deoria (Balvikas Seva evam Pushtahar Vibhag, UP)
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer, Deoria has released a recruitment notification for the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) under the Integrated Child Development Services scheme. A total of 408 vacancies (146 Karyakatri and 262 Sahayika) are open across various projects/blocks in Deoria district. Only female candidates are eligible to apply. The online application process will run through the upanganwadibharti.in portal, with the last date to apply being 31 July 2026.

application_fee.details: Not mentioned in the official notification. No application fee amount or category-wise fee structure has been specified in this notice.

age_limit.details: Not mentioned in the official notification: any age relaxation for reserved categories (EWS, differently-abled candidates, or freedom fighter dependents) - the notification explicitly states that no reservation benefit is available for these categories under the applicable Government Order.

qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts. Applicants must be residents of the same Gram Sabha (village) for rural posts, or the same Ward for urban posts, to which they are applying. The selection process for both posts will be conducted as per the procedure laid down in Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17.09.2025, issued by the Bal Vikas Vibhag and Pushtahar, UP. | Anganwadi Karyakatri: Minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th pass). Anganwadi Sahayika: Minimum qualification is Intermediate or equivalent. The merit list will be prepared based on marks/percentage obtained from Intermediate up to the highest qualification of Postgraduate. High School marks are not included while preparing the merit list for either post.

salary_details.details: Not mentioned in the official notification. The recruitment notice does not specify a fixed monthly honorarium/salary amount for either the Karyakatri or Sahayika post; candidates are advised to refer to the honorarium structure prescribed under Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17.09.2025 for details.

selection_process: Selection for both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts will be entirely merit-based

conducted online through the departmental portal. No written examination or interview will be conducted for these posts. If more than one eligible candidate is available in the same category for a post
a merit list will be prepared among all such eligible candidates. For Sahayika posts
the minimum qualification considered is Intermediate or equivalent
and the maximum qualification considered is Postgraduate
for merit preparation. Merit calculation formula: The percentage of marks obtained by a candidate is divided by 10 to arrive at the marks used for merit. For example
a candidate scoring 45% in Intermediate will be awarded 4.5 marks; a candidate scoring 59% will be awarded 5.9 marks. For candidates with grading or CGPA systems

marks will be calculated using an equivalent conversion method in the same manner. Merit will be calculated up to three decimal places; no rounding off will be done after the decimal point. As per the applicable Government Order
no reservation benefit is available for EWS category
or dependents of freedom fighters in this selection. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease
and any change will be reflected on the official website.
how_to_apply: Visit the official Anganwadi recruitment portal: upanganwadibharti.in.
Locate the online application form for the Deoria Anganwadi Karyakatri/Sahayika Recruitment 2026.
Fill in all details in the online form carefully and accurately as per your original documents.
Upload self-attested, clean, and legible scanned copies of all required documents as specified in the online form.

Verify all entered details, including certificate numbers, registration numbers, and issue dates for educational, income, caste, and residence certificates, since these will be verified online through the portal.
Submit the application before the last date.
important_instructions: Widow candidates: Must submit a death certificate of the husband issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned urban local body, along with an attested copy of the family register. Divorced/deserted candidates: Only a valid legal order issued by a competent court will be accepted. Income certificate: Only income certificates issued at the Tehsildar level as per UP Revenue Department Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj-9 dated 30.09.2011 (as amended), which are online-verifiable, will be accepted. The income limit for the poverty line as prescribed for rural and urban areas under Samaj Kalyan Anubhag-2 Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015 dated 14 September 2015 (as amended) will apply. Residence and caste certificates: Only digitally signed and online-verifiable certificates will be accepted. If a candidate's residence certificate is not verified online, her candidature will not be considered. If a candidate's income certificate is not verified online, she will be treated as above the poverty line and selection action will be taken accordingly. If a candidate's caste certificate is not verified online, she will be treated as belonging to the Unreserved category and selection action will be taken accordingly.

The entire application process is online through the portal upanganwadibharti.in. Applications will not be accepted in hard copy at any stage or level. Certificate numbers, registration numbers, and issue dates for educational, income, caste, and residence certificates entered during the online application will be verified online through the portal. Any candidature found to have incorrect entries in this regard will be automatically rejected, and the full responsibility for this will lie with the candidate. The entire selection process for these posts will be conducted based on the merit and preference given in applications received online through the departmental portal, as per the merit process specified in the Government Order. Applications or documents sent offline or by post will not be accepted. If any detail, fact, figure, or educational credential entered in the application is found to be incorrect, fabricated, or different from the submitted application, the candidature will be rejected. The public is advised not to fall prey to the temptation or lure of any agents or middlemen, and to be cautious of individuals engaging in such practices.

rows.details: Office of the District Programme Officer, Deoria (Balvikas Seva evam Pushtahar Vibhag, UP)
Merit-based; no written exam or interview

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026 (Block/Project-wise)
content_sections.text: The vacancy breakup for each Child Development Project (Bal Vikas Pariyojana) area in Deoria district, category-wise, is given below. Categories are Scheduled Tribe (ST), Scheduled Caste (SC), Other Backward Class (OBC), and Unreserved (UR). Complete Gram Sabha/Ward-wise vacancy details along with reservation eligibility are displayed on the notice boards of the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil office, Nagar Palika/Nagar Panchayat, Child Development Block office, and all Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) offices in Deoria, and are also available on the portal upanganwadibharti.in. Candidates can also obtain this information in person from the concerned CDPO office or the District Programme Office on working days.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts. Applicants must be residents of the same Gram Sabha (village) for rural posts, or the same Ward for urban posts, to which they are applying. The selection process for both posts will be conducted as per the procedure laid down in Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17.09.2025, issued by the Bal Vikas Vibhag and Pushtahar, UP. Anganwadi Karyakatri: Minimum qualification is Intermediate ( 12th pass). Anganwadi Sahayika: Minimum qualification is Intermediate or equivalent. The merit list will be prepared based on marks/percentage obtained from Intermediate up to the highest qualification of Postgraduate. High School marks are not included while preparing the merit list for either post.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Not mentioned in the official notification: any age relaxation for reserved categories (EWS, differently-abled candidates, or freedom fighter dependents) - the notification explicitly states that no reservation benefit is available for these categories under the applicable Government Order.

rows.details: Date of birth as recorded in High School marksheet and certificate only

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Salary
content_sections.text: Not mentioned in the official notification. The recruitment notice does not specify a fixed monthly honorarium/salary amount for either the Karyakatri or Sahayika post; candidates are advised to refer to the honorarium structure prescribed under Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17.09.2025 for details.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not mentioned in the official notification. No application fee amount or category-wise fee structure has been specified in this notice.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Category-wise Certificate and Verification Rules
content_sections.text: Widow candidates: Must submit a death certificate of the husband issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned urban local body, along with an attested copy of the family register. Divorced/deserted candidates: Only a valid legal order issued by a competent court will be accepted. Income certificate: Only income certificates issued at the Tehsildar level as per UP Revenue Department Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj-9 dated 30.09.2011 (as amended), which are online-verifiable, will be accepted. The income limit for the poverty line as prescribed for rural and urban areas under Samaj Kalyan Anubhag-2 Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015 dated 14 September 2015 (as amended) will apply. Residence and caste certificates: Only digitally signed and online-verifiable certificates will be accepted. If a candidate's residence certificate is not verified online, her candidature will not be considered. If a candidate's income certificate is not verified online, she will be treated as above the poverty line and selection action will be taken accordingly. If a candidate's caste certificate is not verified online, she will be treated as belonging to the Unreserved category and selection action will be taken accordingly.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts will be entirely merit-based, conducted online through the departmental portal. No written examination or interview will be conducted for these posts. If more than one eligible candidate is available in the same category for a post, a merit list will be prepared among all such eligible candidates. For Sahayika posts, the minimum qualification considered is Intermediate or equivalent, and the maximum qualification considered is Postgraduate, for merit preparation. Merit calculation formula: The percentage of marks obtained by a candidate is divided by 10 to arrive at the marks used for merit. For example, a candidate scoring 45% in Intermediate will be awarded 4.5 marks; a candidate scoring 59% will be awarded 5.9 marks. For candidates with grading or CGPA systems, marks will be calculated using an equivalent conversion method in the same manner. Merit will be calculated up to three decimal places; no rounding off will be done after the decimal point. As per the applicable Government Order, no reservation benefit is available for EWS category, differently-abled (Divyang) category, or dependents of freedom fighters in this selection. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease, and any change will be reflected on the official website.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Required Documents
content_sections.text: High School marksheet and certificate (for date of birth proof) Intermediate and higher qualification marksheets/certificates, as applicable Digitally signed, online-verifiable residence (domicile) certificate Digitally signed, online-verifiable caste certificate (if claiming reserved category) Income certificate issued at Tehsildar level, online-verifiable (if applicable) Self-attested, clean and legible scanned copies of all documents mentioned in the online application form Death certificate of husband issued by Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned urban body and attested family register copy (for widow candidates) Competent court order (for divorced/deserted candidates)

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: Visit the official Anganwadi recruitment portal: upanganwadibharti.in. Locate the online application form for the Deoria Anganwadi Karyakatri/Sahayika Recruitment 2026. Fill in all details in the online form carefully and accurately as per your original documents. Upload self-attested, clean, and legible scanned copies of all required documents as specified in the online form. Verify all entered details, including certificate numbers, registration numbers, and issue dates for educational, income, caste, and residence certificates, since these will be verified online through the portal. Submit the application before the last date.

content_sections.heading: Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The entire application process is online through the portal upanganwadibharti.in. Applications will not be accepted in hard copy at any stage or level. Certificate numbers, registration numbers, and issue dates for educational, income, caste, and residence certificates entered during the online application will be verified online through the portal. Any candidature found to have incorrect entries in this regard will be automatically rejected, and the full responsibility for this will lie with the candidate. The entire selection process for these posts will be conducted based on the merit and preference given in applications received online through the departmental portal, as per the merit process specified in the Government Order. Applications or documents sent offline or by post will not be accepted. If any detail, fact, figure, or educational credential entered in the application is found to be incorrect, fabricated, or different from the submitted application, the candidature will be rejected. The public is advised not to fall prey to the temptation or lure of any agents or middlemen, and to be cautious of individuals engaging in such practices.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 408 vacancies, comprising 146 posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and 262 posts of Anganwadi Sahayika, across various project/block areas of Deoria district.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are residents of the same Gram Sabha (for rural posts) or the same Ward (for urban posts) as the post applied for are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years, calculated as on 1 July 2026, based on the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply online for Deoria Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 31 July 2026, till 12:00 midnight.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika in Deoria?
faq.answer: Not mentioned in the official notification. Candidates should refer to the honorarium structure prescribed under the applicable Government Order dated 17.09.2025 for salary details.

faq.question: Q7. Is reservation available for EWS or differently-abled candidates in this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. As per the applicable Government Order, no reservation benefit is available for EWS category, differently-abled (Divyang) candidates, or dependents of freedom fighters in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. How is the merit list prepared for Deoria Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The percentage of marks obtained (from Intermediate up to Postgraduate, excluding High School marks) is divided by 10 to calculate merit marks, computed up to three decimal places without rounding.
